Package org.rodinp.core.emf.lightcore.impl

Class LightElementImpl

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.impl.BasicNotifierImpl
org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.BasicEObjectImpl
org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.EObjectImpl
org.rodinp.core.emf.lightcore.impl.LightObjectImpl
org.rodinp.core.emf.lightcore.impl.LightElementImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier, org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, org.eclipse.emf.ecore.InternalEObject, ILElement, LightElement, LightObject
Direct Known Subclasses:
ImplicitElementImpl, InternalElementImpl
public abstract class LightElementImpl extends LightObjectImpl implements LightElement
An implementation of the model object 'Light Element'.

The following features are implemented:

  • EAttributes
  • EIs Root
  • Reference
  • EChildren
  • EParent
  • ERodin Element
  • ERoot
